scope_summary: Apply the two test-only edits recommended by the AI-decision flake investigation: raise the e2e/06 ai-decision-recorded assertion timeout 15000->30000 and lift Playwright local retries 0->1. Verify e2e/06 alone, then the full suite twice. No product source, no commit/push.

local 0->1 so a rare transient flake auto-recovers and trace:on-first-retry captures a step-replay; CI unchanged at 1; trace/screenshot/video behavior preserved

limitations: retries:1 means a future single transient flake is reported 'flaky' (still exit 0) rather than failed — surfaced honestly; does not mask a deterministic bug (a real bug fails both attempts)
